definitions.text: NATO ICAO radiotelephony clear code (spelling-alphabet name) for the digit 3.
A numerical value after two and before four. Represented in Arabic digits as 3; this many dots (•••).
Describing a set or group with three elements.
Anything measuring three units, as length.
examples: Put all the threes in a separate container.

definitions.text: A person who is three years old.
examples: All the threes will go in Mrs. Smith's class, while I'll take the fours and fives.
